text.title: product-explainability Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for product-explainability as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: KB drift as default: marketing site, docs, pricing page, schema feed, and llms.txt diverge within weeks.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each surface is edited by a different team on a different cadence. Without a single-source pipeline, contradiction is the natural state, not the exception.

failure-mode.description: Schema theater: teams add Product JSON-LD but description, audience, and feature fields repeat the marketing tagline.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Retrieval systems get no new signal from paraphrased copy. The schema markup must carry information not already in the page text.

failure-mode.description: Capability-version skew: capability statements with no validFrom/validUntil dates.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Deprecated features keep getting recommended by AI assistants because there is no signal in the KB that they no longer exist. Date-bounded capability status is the fix.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force a "no adjectives, no superlatives" constraint in the system prompt and lint generated output. These tokens provide no retrieval signal and reduce trust.

failure-mode.description: Extractor agent fabricating capabilities to fill empty fields.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Refuse-on-unknown must be enforced via prompt and post-hoc validator that cross-checks capability names against the feature flag registry or source code. Invented capabilities create support and legal liability.

failure-mode.description: Limit array lost across multi-step pipeline summarization passes.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Preserve the limits[] array verbatim across every pipeline stage. Never re-summarize limits — they carry legal and trust-critical precision that compression loses.

failure-mode.description: Probe agents producing the same response across runs due to same prompt and cached model state.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Vary question phrasing, user role, and timing across probe runs. Stable scores are an artifact of caching, not real representation quality.

failure-mode.description: Hallucinated since_version: agents guess versions if not given a changelog.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hard requirement: extractor must read a real changelog or refuse. Version strings must be validated against actual release tags.

failure-mode.description: Schema bloat: generator agents produce maximalist JSON-LD with every optional field.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: AI retrieval prefers small, dense, accurate markup. Cap field count; lint with structured-data-testing-tool.

failure-mode.description: Confidentiality leak: capability statements reveal unlaunched features, internal infra (vendor names, region IDs, partner SKUs).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Run a scrubber agent before any external publish — especially before pushing llms.txt or schema.org markup.

failure-mode.description: No human checkpoint on deprecated flips: agent autonomously removes a capability from AI-mediated discovery.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Marking a capability deprecated removes it from AI discovery and impacts revenue. Always require a product-owner sign-off before status changes; never let the agent flip status autonomously.

failure-mode.description: Cross-locale drift via auto-translation: translation agents helpfully translate "limit" in ways that lose legal precision.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Limits and disclaimers go through human review per locale; non-negotiable. Never auto-translate capability limits.

failure-mode.description: llms.txt echo chamber: many sites copy each other's llms.txt; the agent will follow the herd.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force a pre-publish diff against the top-3 competitors' llms.txt; if similarity >0.7, regenerate. Avoid herd homogenization.

failure-mode.description: Probe-set staleness: canonical question sets calcify while the product evolves.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Refresh the question set whenever a new capability ships or a customer reports a wrong AI answer. Stale questions produce artificially flat accuracy.
